Frequently asked questions
What is Reclaim.ai?
Reclaim.ai is the AI calendar assistant that helps organizations move from reactive scheduling to proactive time optimization. It intelligently protects focus time, improves meeting quality, and aligns calendars to strategic priorities — while giving leaders visibility into how time is actually spent.
Unlike basic scheduling tools or passive analytics dashboards, Reclaim connects insight to action. Its AI surfaces recommendations, enables safe preview and approval of changes, and automates policy enforcement at scale. Ideal for growing teams and enterprises seeking higher performance without burnout, Reclaim transforms time from a hidden cost into a measurable advantage.
Does Reclaim.ai work with Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar?
Yes – Reclaim runs on your Google Calendar or Outlook Calendar account, automatically scheduling your AI-powered meetings, focus time, tasks, and habits around your existing events. You can even sync multiple calendars across
Google and Outlook
to prevent conflicts and protect personal commitments on your work schedule.
Is Reclaim for individuals or enterprise teams?
Reclaim is built for everyone — from individuals to company-wide
enterprise deployments
.
Many of our largest company rollouts began with a single user who improved their own productivity, inspired their team, and caught leadership’s attention. Reclaim scales naturally from personal AI scheduling automation to organization-wide AI calendar management.
Here's how Reclaim works for individuals and across organizations:
Individuals:
Automatically schedule tasks, habits, and
Focus Time
to stay focused and adaptable. Optimize meetings to reduce conflicts, fragmentation, and interruptions while gaining insights into how your time is spent.
Managers:
Protect team focus time, balance meeting load, and gain visibility into workloads and priorities, and ensure important work has time allocated across the team.
Companies & enterprise leaders:
Automate focus and meeting policies across the org,
measure time allocation
and meeting hygiene through executive dashboards, and use secure, privacy-first insights to drive measurable productivity and efficiency at scale.
How does Reclaim.ai’s AI scheduling work?
Reclaim’s AI scheduling assistant intelligently optimizes your calendar around your priorities, workload, meetings, and focus time — helping you make better use of your week without constant manual planning.
The assistant continuously analyzes your availability, surfaces recommendations and trade-offs, and helps rebalance your schedule as priorities shift. You can interact with it conversationally to optimize your week, resolve conflicts, protect focus time, or adjust meetings — with preview and approval controls before changes are applied.
As your schedule changes throughout the week, Reclaim dynamically adapts meetings, tasks, and focus time to reduce overload, resolve conflicts, and protect important work.
What productivity results can I expect with Reclaim.ai?
Across all users, Reclaim delivers measurable results week after week:
+7.6 hours of focus time per week
+2.6 lunches defended per week
-4.15 hours of overtime per week
+55.4% improved productivity
+41.9% work-life balance
-46.7% burnout
-66.6% decision paralysis
-77.2% work stress
Is Reclaim.ai a Calendly alternative?
Yes — and users find it’s far superior.
Reclaim.ai isn’t

Free features
5 AI Agents
i
Create specialized agents to continuously optimize your schedule across Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meeting, and Meeting Quality agents.
Focus Time
i
Set a weekly Focus Time goal, and automatically defend time to get stuff done around your existing calendar events.
Habits
i
AI-powered recurring events that automatically find the best time within your smart schedule windows.
Buffer Time
i
Defend breaks automatically after video call events so you have time to reset & prepare for your next meeting.
Smart Meetings
i
Convert your recurring meetings to Smart Meetings in one click to automatically monitor, prioritize, and resolve scheduling conflicts across your meetings.
Meeting Quality
i
Flag invites that still need your response and nudge you to accept, decline, or propose a new time—so organizers can plan and your calendar stays accurate.
Plus:
1 user team

i
Sync & copy events between calendars to defend your availability across multiple schedules.

i
Share your availability for meetings with Scheduling Links that offer smart priority settings to book the right meetings sooner.
Limited integrations
i
Get Google Tasks, Slack, Zoom, and Google Meet support in the free Lite plan, and unlimited support for these plus Todoist, Asana, ClickUp, Jira, and Linear in all paid plans.
Task recommendations
i
Automatically generate recommended tasks through action items from your meetings so you don't fall behind on deliverables and opportunities between meetings.
LAUNCH PROMO: Attendee Users (AUs) are 100% free through July 31st.

AUs are attendees without a paid Reclaim seat for Smart Meetings with 3+ people (2-person meetings do not require AUs), and are cumulative for a team account.

Reclaim.ai Help Center
Search for articles...
Get started with Reclaim
New to Reclaim? Start here to learn about what Reclaim is as well as how it works.
19 articles
Switching from Clockwise
Clockwise is recommending Reclaim. Learn more about switching.
2 articles
Focus Time
How to defend more time for focus during the workweek.
4 articles
Habits
How to use Habits to set up flexible routines on your calendar.
5 articles
Tasks
How to use Tasks to automatically block time on the calendar to get work done.
9 articles
Calendar Sync
How to use Calendar Sync to block events across multiple calendars.
15 articles
Scheduling Links
How to create and share Scheduling Links to book your meetings.
14 articles
Smart Meetings
How to use Smart Meetings to automate your recurring meetings.
8 articles
Buffers, Settings, and Color-Coding
How to customize your Reclaim settings, enable buffers between meetings, and color-code your calendar using Reclaim.
21 articles
Task integrations
How to sync tasks from Todoist, Asana, ClickUp, Linear, Jira, & Google Tasks.
17 articles
Planner
How to use Reclaim's Planner feature to prioritize your workweek.
2 articles
Stats
How to use Reclaim to analyze your time and your team's time.
4 articles
Videoconferencing & chat integrations
How to integrate Reclaim with Zoom and Slack to better communicate your availability.
7 articles
Add-ons & extensions
Learn how to use Reclaim on your mobile or desktop device, as well as our Google Calendar Add-on and Raycast extension.
10 articles
Account and Team Administration
How to manage your team and account settings in Reclaim.
23 articles
Billing
Learn about plans, pricing, billing, and discounts.
15 articles
Security and Compliance
More information about Reclaim's privacy and security certifications and policies.
8 articles
Beta features
Learn more about beta features and what we're working on at Reclaim.
8 articles
Support and Troubleshooting
How to contact our support team and get help with common questions.
6 articles
Learning Labs
Exercises & labs to get you familiar with Reclaim features
8 articles
#1 AI calendar for work.

hits.title: Show HN: Reclaim – an adaptive calendar app that plans time for your routines
Show HN: Reclaim Tasks – automatic task scheduling on your calendar
Questions to ask in a calendar time audit
Show HN: Reclaim – an adaptive calendar app that plans time for your routines
Task Management Trends Managers vs. Individual Contributors Statistics
Do you also struggle with procrastination?

analysis.name: Reclaim.ai
analysis.value_proposition: AI agents that automatically schedule focus time, habits, tasks, and meetings around your existing calendar to maximize productivity and protect deep work.
analysis.ideal_customer: Knowledge workers and teams on Google Calendar or Outlook who want AI to auto-manage their schedule, protect deep work, and coordinate team availability

features.name: ai focus time
features.description: Set a weekly Focus Time goal and let AI automatically defend time blocks around existing calendar events
features.evidence_quote: Set a weekly Focus Time goal, and automatically defend time to get stuff done around your existing calendar events.

features.name: ai habits
features.description: AI-powered recurring events that automatically find the best time within flexible schedule windows
features.evidence_quote: AI-powered recurring events that automatically find the best time within your smart schedule windows.

features.name: ai tasks
features.description: Automatically block calendar time to complete tasks with flexible rescheduling
features.evidence_quote: How to use Tasks to automatically block time on the calendar to get work done.

features.name: ai smart meetings
features.description: Convert recurring meetings to smart meetings that auto-monitor, prioritize, and resolve scheduling conflicts across all attendees
features.evidence_quote: Convert your recurring meetings to Smart Meetings in one click to automatically monitor, prioritize, and resolve scheduling conflicts.

features.name: ai scheduling links
features.description: Share availability via smart scheduling links with intelligent meeting controls
features.evidence_quote: How to create and share Scheduling Links to book your meetings.

features.name: ai buffer time
features.description: Auto-schedule breaks and travel time after video calls so there is time to reset before the next meeting
features.evidence_quote: Defend breaks automatically after video call events so you have time to reset & prepare for your next meeting.

features.name: ai calendar sync
features.description: Automatically defend time for events across multiple calendars (personal, work, etc.)
features.evidence_quote: How to use Calendar Sync to block events across multiple calendars.

features.name: ai planner
features.description: Automate the perfect daily plan and manage all smart calendar events in a unified view
features.evidence_quote: How to use Reclaim's Planner feature to prioritize your workweek.

features.name: ai time tracking
features.description: Automatically track and analyze time across meetings, tasks, and work-life balance metrics
features.evidence_quote: Analyze your time across meetings, tasks, & work-life balance metrics.

features.name: team ooo calendar
features.description: Automatic team-wide out-of-office visibility surfaced in the calendar
features.evidence_quote: Make out-of-office visibility automatic.

features.name: ai hours
features.description: Automate scheduling around personal working hour preferences
features.evidence_quote: Automate scheduling around your work preferences.

features.name: workforce analytics
features.description: Team-level analytics showing how teams spend time across meetings, focus, and tasks
features.evidence_quote: See how teams spend their time.

features.name: ai agent library
features.description: Library of specialized AI agents (Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meeting, Meeting Quality) that continuously optimize schedule
features.evidence_quote: Create specialized agents to continuously optimize your schedule across Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meeting, and Meeting Quality agents.

features.name: meeting quality agent
features.description: Flags unanswered meeting invites and nudges user to accept, decline, or propose a new time
features.evidence_quote: Flag invites that still need your response and nudge you to accept, decline, or propose a new time—so organizers can plan.

features.name: slack status sync
features.description: Automatically syncs Reclaim calendar state to Slack status
features.evidence_quote: Sync your Slack status with Reclaim.

features.name: color-coding
features.description: Automatically color-code calendar events by type via Reclaim
features.evidence_quote: Buffers, Settings, and Color-Coding: How to color-code your calendar using Reclaim.

features.name: google calendar add-on
features.description: Native Google Calendar add-on to access Reclaim features within Google Calendar UI
features.evidence_quote: Get the free Google Calendar add-on

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Mobile device app for managing Reclaim on the go
features.evidence_quote: Learn how to use Reclaim on your mobile or desktop device

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Desktop application for accessing Reclaim features natively
features.evidence_quote: Learn how to use Reclaim on your mobile or desktop device

features.name: raycast extension
features.description: Raycast extension for accessing Reclaim scheduling features from the macOS command bar
features.evidence_quote: Raycast integration

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Webhook support for custom integrations and automation pipelines
features.evidence_quote: Webhooks

features.name: scheduling range control
features.description: Control how far into the future Reclaim can schedule events; Lite is limited to 1 week
features.evidence_quote: 1 week scheduling range (exc. Scheduling Links)

features.name: task integrations
features.description: Sync tasks from Todoist, Asana, ClickUp, Linear, Jira, and Google Tasks into Reclaim for auto-scheduling
features.evidence_quote: How to sync tasks from Todoist, Asana, ClickUp, Linear, Jira, & Google Tasks.

features.name: no meeting day initiative
features.description: Enterprise team initiative to designate dedicated no-meeting days across the organization
features.evidence_quote: No Meeting Day Initiative: Enable dedicated focus days.

features.name: meeting agenda initiative
features.description: Enterprise initiative to improve meeting effectiveness with structured agendas
features.evidence_quote: Meeting Agenda Initiative: Run more effective meetings.

features.name: focus time initiative
features.description: Enterprise program to roll out team-wide focus time protection policies
features.evidence_quote: Focus Time Initiative: Protect time for deep work.

features.name: calendar fragmentation initiative
features.description: Enterprise initiative to reduce time lost to calendar fragmentation across the workday
features.evidence_quote: Calendar Fragmentation Initiative: Reduce lost time across the workday.

features.name: slack notifications initiative
features.description: Enterprise initiative to reduce unnecessary Slack interruptions organization-wide
features.evidence_quote: Slack Notifications Initiative: Prevent unnecessary interruptions.

features.name: buffer time initiative
features.description: Enterprise initiative to standardize buffer time between meetings across teams
features.evidence_quote: Buffer Time Initiative: Create space to prepare and reset.

features.name: team ooo initiative
features.description: Enterprise initiative to automate and surface out-of-office status across the organization
features.evidence_quote: Team OOO Initiative: Make out-of-office visibility automatic.

features.name: team administration
features.description: Admin controls for managing team members, seats, and account settings
features.evidence_quote: Account and Team Administration: How to manage your team and account settings in Reclaim.

features.name: security and compliance
features.description: Privacy certifications, compliance policies, and responsible disclosure for enterprise requirements
features.evidence_quote: Security and Compliance: More information about Reclaim's privacy and security certifications and policies.

features.name: referral program
features.description: Earn a free Business plan subscription by referring new users
features.evidence_quote: You can even earn a free Business plan subscription through our Referral Pr

features.name: affiliate program
features.description: Affiliate partner program for earning commissions promoting Reclaim
features.evidence_quote: Affiliate program

features.name: managed partner program
features.description: Managed reseller and partner program for agencies and MSPs
features.evidence_quote: Managed Partner program

features.name: student discount
features.description: Discounted plan pricing for students
features.evidence_quote: Student Discount

features.name: nonprofit discount
features.description: Discounted plan pricing for nonprofit organizations
features.evidence_quote: Nonprofit Discount

features.name: startup discount
features.description: Discounted plan pricing for early-stage startups
features.evidence_quote: Startup Discount

features.name: competitor discount
features.description: Discounted pricing for users switching from competing products
features.evidence_quote: Competitor Discount

features.name: pomodoro timer
features.description: Free standalone Pomodoro timer tool for focused productivity sessions
features.evidence_quote: Pomodoro Timer: Boost your focus and productivity with the free Pomodoro Timer.

features.name: meeting cost calculator
features.description: Free tool to calculate the monetary cost of meetings
features.evidence_quote: Meeting Cost Calculator

features.name: beta features access
features.description: Access to beta features and early releases of upcoming product capabilities
features.evidence_quote: Beta features: Learn more about beta features and what we're working on at Reclaim.

features.name: stats and time analytics
features.description: Personal and team time-use statistics and analytics dashboard
features.evidence_quote: Stats: How to use Reclaim to analyze your time and your team's time.

features.name: no-train ai privacy
features.description: Reclaim does not train its AI models on user calendar data
features.evidence_quote: We don't train AI on your data

differentiators: We don't train AI on your data
100% free plan — no credit card required
AI agents that continuously and automatically optimize the full schedule
Free 14-day Business trial for all new users
Adaptive scheduling that defends both work and personal life time

recent_ships.source: Hacker News thread: 'Dropbox Acquires Reclaim.ai' (32 upvotes, 24 comments)

recent_ships.what: AI Agent Library — specialized scheduling agents (Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meeting, Meeting Quality)
recent_ships.source: Pricing page feature description: 'Create specialized agents to continuously optimize your schedule'

recent_ships.what: Meeting Quality Agent — nudges users to respond to unacknowledged invites
recent_ships.source: Pricing page: 'Flag invites that still need your response and nudge you to accept, decline, or propose a new time'

praised: Adaptive calendar that automatically plans time for recurring routines (HN Show HN launch thread, 106 upvotes)
Automatic task scheduling directly on the calendar (HN Show HN thread, 10 upvotes)

free_tier.limits: 1 user, 1-week scheduling range (excl. Scheduling Links), 5 AI agents

tiers.name: Lite
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 AI agents, Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meetings, Meeting Quality; 1 user, 1-week scheduling range

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Longer scheduling range, more events, additional AI scheduling power vs Lite (exact price not visible in source)

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited access, team-wide controls, full feature set including workforce analytics (exact price not visible in source)

pricing.notes: 30% new-user promo active on Starter & Business at time of scrape; 20% off all paid plans on annual billing; all new users get free 14-day Business trial before rolling to Lite; special discounts available for students, nonprofits, startups, and users switching from competitors; referral program lets users earn free Business subscription; Starter and Business exact per-seat prices were truncated in source and could not be confirmed
